{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320125211C7DEEF22EDB54AD6FE27"}"},"total":135},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611906302035936062","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我感觉挺好看的啊，前提是不要带脑子看[尬笑][尬笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772287779,"group_id":"7595781992474496024","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwdPBbGbtBHLMCHUYPN6zeg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"871246780434484","user_name":"喜欢伏羲琴的贾赦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"871246780434484","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595781992474496024","book_info":{"abstract":"现代人杨璟穿越到异世古代一个同名同姓的皇帝身上，这个陌生的朝代从此变得不太一样了起来！
后宫的妃子们个个身怀绝技，心怀鬼胎，简直就像八仙过海一般热闹非常！
杨妃：“凭借本小姐现代人的见识跟眼光，什么诗词歌赋、什么奇技淫巧，在本小姐面前通通都是渣渣，古代的人啊，让你们见识一下什么叫做科技与狠活吧。”
瑾妃：“阿姐，当年谋害你的主人就在这里，阿瑾发誓，一定会为阿姐的无辜惨死讨个公道。”
皇后：“吾乃仙界仙帝转世，若不是必须以皇后的身份在皇宫内吸收龙气重返仙界，岂会嫁给一个凡夫俗子，又岂会、呕、孕吐好难受。”
杨璟：“爱妃们，任你们有天大的能耐，都逃不出朕的手掌心，因为朕的系统，很强大。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e3e63899d42d7d3e184bb85c4d5797d8","author":"大院二大爷","author_id":"","book_id":"7595781992474496024","book_name":"穿越皇帝，朕的后宫要崩了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d0d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595782103908745752","read_count":"115656","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"351424"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"173","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,多女主,皇帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/48bd9880fb69da1f0fdbbda3e7330c62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779166332&x-signature=MzZkwjprn7NjrEUi8FmylOv6ElM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110338761694","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"140"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320125211C7DEEF22EDB54AD6FE27"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded
